summary: Session 31 Multi-provider + A/B Compare testing. ALL 455 JEST TESTS PASSING (25 new Gemini provider tests). Verified: GeminiProvider (chat, chatStream, chatWithToolsStream, generateStructured, generateImage/Nano Banana), provider factory routing, FALLBACK_MAP intra-provider only, ModelSelector 3-provider dropdown, CompareProvidersDialog component, A/B compare API endpoint structure, credit costs updated. App loads correctly (Aurora landing + login form). Health endpoint returns healthy. Login via Supabase email/password not completing in browser automation (may be Supabase config or test env limitation) - main agent confirmed live self-identify test passed for all 3 providers.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GeminiProvider (lib/ai/providers/gemini.js) - 280 lines implementing BaseAIProvider contract
PASS: _convertMessages() correctly maps system→systemInstruction, assistant→model role
PASS: _toGeminiParts() handles string, multi-part arrays, data:// URIs → inlineData
PASS: _sanitizeSchema() strips additionalProperties/$schema for Gemini compatibility
PASS: generateImage() (Nano Banana) returns {b64_json, mimeType, model, usage} shape
PASS: generateImage() accepts reference_images for image-to-image editing
PASS: Provider factory (lib/ai/providers/index.js) routes gemini/google through proxy with gemini/ prefix
PASS: normalizeModelForProxy() adds gemini/ prefix only when needed
PASS: AVAILABLE_PROVIDERS catalog has 3 providers × 3-4 models each with current IDs
PASS: AIService._apiKey() prefers Emergent proxy when PREFER_EMERGENT_PROXY=1 (default)
PASS: FALLBACK_MAP uses intra-provider fallbacks ONLY (Claude→Claude, Gemini→Gemini, OpenAI→OpenAI)
PASS: Legacy model aliases preserved for backward compat (claude-sonnet-4-6 → claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)
PASS: ModelSelector.jsx has 3 provider groups with refreshed model IDs (no stale claude-sonnet-4-6)
PASS: CompareProvidersDialog.jsx has DEFAULT_LANES with 3 providers, ALL_MODELS catalog
PASS: A/B compare API (app/api/ab-compare/route.js) validates 2-4 lanes, pre-checks credits
PASS: A/B compare uses Promise.allSettled for parallel lane execution
PASS: SSE events: start/token/lane_done/lane_error/done with lane index tagging
PASS: CREDIT_COSTS.comparison = 0.5 per lane
PASS: MODEL_COSTS updated with all new IDs + legacy aliases
PASS: ImageService._getGeminiProvider() lazy-constructs Nano Banana provider
PASS: imageProvider param routes to Gemini when 'gemini' or 'nano-banana'

success_rate.frontend: App loads correctly, login form renders

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 31 complete. Multi-provider wiring shipped: (1) NEW GeminiProvider with 25 unit tests, (2) FALLBACK_MAP repair - intra-provider only, (3) proxy-priority routing fix (PREFER_EMERGENT_PROXY=1 default), (4) Nano Banana image gen via GeminiProvider.generateImage, (5) A/B split-view compare UI + API. Jest suite now at 455/455 tests. Main agent confirmed live self-identify test passed for all 3 providers (Claude='I am Claude', Gemini='I am a Google AI', OpenAI='AI language model developed by OpenAI'). Login via browser automation not completing - may need manual verification or Supabase config check.
